hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-800
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-800
hierarchy.label: text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-teal-600

layout.spacing: Generous padding (py-20 to py-32 for sections), wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges
layout.surfaces: Soft minimal shadows (shadow-sm to shadow-md), Glassmorphism for sticky header (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl)
layout.white_space: High - allow elements to breathe to create a calming, non-clinical environment.

components.navbar: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50). Logo on left, navigation in center, CTA 'Konsultasi Gratis' (redirecting to WhatsApp) on right. Mobile hamburger menu.
components.hero: Two-column layout on desktop. Left: Headline, Subheadline, CTA primary (Teal) + Secondary (Outline), Trust Badges. Right: Parallax floating child illustration/photo. Background: subtle floating shapes.
components.timeline_section: CRITICAL FEATURE. Vertical timeline using Framer Motion. A central vertical line that draws itself (useScroll). 6 alternating nodes (0-12m, 1-2y, 2-3y, 3-4y, 4-5y, 5-6y). Each node contains a Lottie animation, age badge, description, and a 2x2 grid of milestones (Bahasa, Motorik, Sosial, Kognitif) with small icons. Sticky age indicator on mobile.
components.services: Grid of 4 cards (Wicara, Fisioterapi, Okupasi, Psikologi). Rounded-3xl, pastel tinted backgrounds (e.g., bg-teal-50, bg-orange-50). Hover effect: -translate-y-2, scale up slightly, enhanced shadow.
components.why_us: Bento grid or alternating rows highlighting unique value propositions with icons.
components.workflow: 4 animated steps. Horizontal on desktop, vertical on mobile. Connecting dashed lines.
components.testimonials: Shadcn Carousel (embla-carousel). Rounded cards, quote icons, parent names.
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion. Clean, minimal borders. Friendly plus/minus icons.
components.contact: Two columns: Form (Name, WA, Keluhan) on left, Contact Details + Google Maps embed on right.
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right corner button. Green (#25D366), rounded-full, pulsing animation (animate-pulse or custom framer-motion pulse), high z-index.

animations.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-50px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}
animations.timeline_line: Framer Motion: motion.div style={{ scaleY: scrollYProgress, transformOrigin: 'top' }}

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Write all components using `.js`/`.jsx` files. DO NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion lucide-react @lottiefiles/react-lottie-player embla-carousel-react react-hook-form`.
Add Google Fonts 'Nunito' and 'DM Sans' to the index.html or global CSS.
All language MUST be in Bahasa Indonesia as requested.
Tone is warm, empathetic, trustworthy, and professional. Avoid dark mode entirely.
Ensure every interactive element (buttons, form inputs, accordion triggers, carousel controls) has a unique `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).

Build the 'Timeline Perjalanan Tumbuh Kembang' as the core interactive piece. Use framer-motion to draw a vertical line on scroll. Use `@lottiefiles/react-lottie-player` to show a generic child animation JSON (use public lottie URLs for testing, e.g., https://lottie.host/294b684d-d6b4-4116-ab35-853466c5c0aa/P1KqFp3H73.json) in each milestone card.
Make the layout mobile-first. The timeline should have a sticky 'Age' indicator at the top on mobile while scrolling through the milestones.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for Accordions, Forms, and Carousel. Style them to have rounded corners (rounded-2xl) and soft borders, removing any default 'Vercel/sterile' boxy look.
Implement smooth scrolling to sections when clicking on navbar links.
Floating WhatsApp CTA should be absolutely clear, fixed at bottom-right, and pulse to attract attention.
Ensure high contrast and accessibility while keeping the colors soft (use the teal #3A868F for primary text on light backgrounds).
